title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: bundles and serves Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. as a local REST API with one CLI command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK for Ollama—chat, generate, pull, and embed with async/await.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client—chat, stream, embeddings; integrates with LangChain & LlamaIndex.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint with memory, tools, agents.

title: llama-index-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM integration—build RAG pipelines over local Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui (now Open WebUI)
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web frontend for Ollama with chat history, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI wrapper with syntax highlighting, conversation persistence, keybindings.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension turning Ollama into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (CPU & GPU) with one-command run examples.

title: ollama-nvidia-nim
summary: Community discussion on using Ollama as backend for NVIDIA NIM micro-services.

title: ollama-rag-stack
summary: Starter template: FastAPI + Ollama + Chroma + Streamlit for private RAG in Docker.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive streaming.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth & rate-limiting in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes (Llama-3, Phi-3, StarCoder, etc.) with quantization notes.

title: reddit/r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, custom models, and integrations around Ollama.

title: ollama-hnsw
summary: Go micro-service adding in-memory HNSW vector search on top of Ollama embeddings.

title: ollama-chat-telegram
summary: Telegram bot forwarding messages to Ollama with streaming replies and group support.

title: ollama-github-action
summary: GitHub Action to spin up Ollama service in CI for testing code-generation models.

title: ollama-hackernews-discussion
summary: HN thread comparing Ollama to llama.cpp, text-generation-webui, and local LLM deployment tips.
